headlines.description: — Josh Allen and the Buffalo Bills came into the season with soaring expectations and their sights set on a deep playoff run.
headlines.shortLinkText: Singletary, Cook lead way as Bills beat Bears for AFC East

events.name: New Orleans Saints at Cleveland Browns

headlines.description: — Without a roof over their heads, the Saints went outside and handled the frightful weather — and the Browns.
headlines.shortLinkText: Saints overcome deficit, bitter cold to beat Browns 17-10

events.name: Seattle Seahawks at Kansas City Chiefs

headlines.description: — Even as the Kansas City Chiefs squeaked out wins the past few weeks, coach Andy Reid lamented both the state of their inexperienced defense and their inability to put away struggling teams.
headlines.shortLinkText: Chiefs dump Seahawks 24-10, stay tied for AFC's best record

events.name: New York Giants at Minnesota Vikings

headlines.description: — Justin Jefferson got the ball just far enough across midfield for Minnesota Vikings coach Kevin O'Connell to summon Greg Joseph for a kick he'd never before made in a game from that distance.
headlines.shortLinkText: Vikings edge Giants 27-24 on Joseph's game-ending 61-yard FG

events.name: Cincinnati Bengals at New England Patriots

headlines.description: — Joe Burrow wanted to be happier after the Cincinnati Bengals walked off the field toting a 22-18 win over the New England Patriots on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bengals force late red zone turnover, hold off Pats 22-18

headlines.description: — D’Onta Foreman knew the Carolina Panthers' offensive linemen meant business when they walked into a meeting room following Friday's walkthrough practice. They were silent, and wearing full-length black ski masks.
headlines.shortLinkText: Panthers run past Lions 37-23, maintain division title hopes

headlines.description: — As coach John Harbaugh discussed Baltimore's victory over Atlanta, a television in the back of the news conference room was showing the Cincinnati-New England game.
headlines.shortLinkText: Huntley, Ravens beat Falcons 17-9, secure playoff spot

headlines.description: — The Houston Texans have been fighting, scrapping and clawing, only to come up short too many times this season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Texans snap 9-game skid by beating skidding Titans 19-14

headlines.description: — Brock Purdy shook off a sluggish first half and did what he has done since taking over as starting quarterback for the San Francisco 49ers: He delivered big plays.
headlines.shortLinkText: Purdy leads 49ers past Commanders 37-20 for 8th straight win

headlines.description: — Dak Prescott stepped to the podium after helping Dallas rally past the Philadelphia Eagles and immediately addressed the first reason the Cowboys needed a comeback.
headlines.shortLinkText: Prescott, Cowboys win 40-34, make Eagles wait on top seed

events.name: Las Vegas Raiders at Pittsburgh Steelers

headlines.description: — Mike Tomlin wasn't ready to go there, with all due respect.
headlines.shortLinkText: Steelers honor Franco Harris by rallying past Raiders 13-10
